directory.name: AnyMCP
directory.description: A catalog of single-file MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers for .NET 10 (Preview 4+). These servers are written in C# and work with any LLM that supports local MCP connections.
directory.type: Static site catalog of .NET-based single-file MCP servers

submission_guidelines.summary: Submit a .cs file with YAML front matter to the mcp/ directory via a GitHub Pull Request.
steps: Create a branch: git checkout -b add-your-server-name
Add a new .cs file to the mcp/ directory with YAML front matter in C# comments
Write your MCP server code below the front matter
Create a Pull Request with a clear description
submission_guidelines.file_location: mcp/ directory at the root of the repository
submission_guidelines.file_format: C# (.cs) file with YAML front matter in C# comments

required_fields.description: Unique identifier for your server (kebab-case, used in URLs)

optional_fields.description: stable, beta, or alpha (defaults to stable)

technical_requirements: Use ModelContextProtocol package version 0.3.0-preview.3 or later
Single file - keep everything in one .cs file
Add XML comments for public methods
Include proper error handling and logging
submission_guidelines.review_process: Pull Request reviewed manually by maintainers
code_of_conduct: Provide useful, working code that adds value to the catalog
Follow the established patterns and conventions
submission_guidelines.license: MIT (contributions licensed under the same license)
